PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Shustoff for Andrew Colvin (Petitioner).

The Court stated that this is a petition to probate a lost will and that the statutory presumption is that there was an attempt to destroy the will. Mr. Shustoff stated that he filed two declarations setting forth the parties personal knowledge of the surrounding circumstances of the Decedent's Son having control over her after the Spouse died, that the will was in existence when the first spouse died and that the surviving Spouse made no changes. Mr. Shustoff also stated that both Parents did not want the Son to be in control of the assets, or be the Personal Representative or the Trustee. The Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
